query:
-- Insert learning patterns
INSERT INTO learning_patterns (patternType, pattern, occurrences, successRate, avgQuality, avgCost, isActive, confidence) VALUES
('quality_failure_pattern', '{"symptom":"Quality score 82/100","root_cause":"Naive lexical relevance","solution":"Semantic similarity embeddings","indicators":["Low term overlap","Score 82","Relevance 60"]}', 1, '1.0', '91', '0.0004', 1, '0.95'),
('deployment_blank_page', '{"symptom":"Blank page in prod","root_cause":"Vite env vars not in build","solution":"Create .env.production","indicators":["%VITE_*% in HTML","URIError","Works in dev"]}', 1, '1.0', '100', '0', 1, '1.0'),
('complexity_zero', '{"symptom":"Complexity 0.00","root_cause":"No baseline for short queries","solution":"Add 0.15 baseline","indicators":["Queries <20 words","Always gpt-4o-mini"]}', 1, '1.0', '91', '0', 1, '0.9'),
('api_404_pattern', '{"symptom":"API 404","root_cause":"Missing /v1 prefix","solution":"Use /v1/embeddings","indicators":["404 error","Embeddings API"]}', 1, '1.0', '0', '0', 1, '1.0');
